caption_text: the hub stays small; the work lives in the labels

cards.dims_superseded: typographic satellites carry no card rects (containers earn their existence) — the engine's only rect is the hub hero; std dims are n/a

census_amendments.note: kit vocabulary: the engine renders the orchestrator hub as the kit's HERO card (accent ring, rx16, workflow mark) with a zone header and ndesc-classed satellite lines; the hand panel predates those classes (hp2-*), so its own census reads them as a plain card and uncounted text. (desc_lines amendment retired: the census counts in-card desc rows — both sides read 1; the 8 satellite lines are containerless text, and the stale amended 8 was masked by the retired either-accept.)
